micro_pipelines.title: Frontend Web
micro_pipelines.summary: Component tree, state modeli, API contract, loading/empty/error states, responsive ve accessibility akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: Backend / API
micro_pipelines.summary: Domain model, API contract, validation, auth, business logic, tests ve docs akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: Database / Data Layer
micro_pipelines.summary: Schema, migration, consistency ve data integrity akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: Agentic System
micro_pipelines.summary: Agent boundaries, tool map, memory/context policy, orchestration, eval ve guardrail akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: STM32 Firmware
micro_pipelines.summary: Pin map, peripheral allocation, timing, ISR/control logic ve fault handling akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: HVAC Driver Circuits
micro_pipelines.summary: 220V fan speed control ve compressor on/off driver devresi için safety ve isolation odaklı akış.

micro_pipelines.title: RAG / Knowledge Retrieval
micro_pipelines.summary: Chunking, index, retrieval, grounding ve source traceability akışı.

micro_pipelines.title: QCW Diode Stack RFQ
micro_pipelines.summary: Vendor RFQ dili, optical/electrical/cooling specs ve drawing request akışı.
